general.quitConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to quit app?

settings.localNetworkGatewayDesc: Tunnel that routes system traffic to the bypass core.
settings.dnsAddressDesc: Server that resolves domain names to IP addresses.
settings.connectionPortDesc: Local network port used to access the bypass core.
settings.secureDnsDohDesc: Sends DNS queries encrypted over the HTTPS protocol.
settings.ipv4PriorityDesc: Locks DNS resolution to IPv4 for maximum stability.
settings.networkScopeModeSysDesc: All network traffic is automatically routed through OpenGate.
settings.networkScopeModeAppDesc: Only manually configured applications are within the access scope.
settings.proxyConfigGuideDesc: Use the following information for application-based access:
settings.proxyBroadcastStationDesc: Turns your device into a proxy server to make the DPI shield available for use by all devices on the local network.
settings.deviceSetupGuideDesc: Enable manual proxy configuration on target device and define the following details:
settings.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically start the protection core on login.
settings.gettingStartedDesc: Review basic features and usage tips.

onboarding.slide1Title: Internet service providers monitor your network traffic and decide on your digital boundaries.
onboarding.slide1Desc: OpenGate removes boundaries with stability and without speed loss.
onboarding.slide2Title: OpenGate resists these restrictions with smart packet fragmentation algorithms and encrypted DNS resolution. Even if service providers take measures against DPI bypass techniques, the core is prepared for every scenario.
onboarding.slide2Desc: A proven multi-layered algorithm chain scaling from mild to aggressive responds to every attempt with even smarter and more aggressive fragmentation.
onboarding.slide3Title: To have OpenGate activate automatically in every session, we recommend enabling 'Activate on Startup' from settings.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Start protection by clicking the shield button on the application screen.
